feature: Embedded Asset Bundle — rust-embed for CLI Templates and Schemas
description: Replace scattered include_str! and hardcoded template strings in hex-cli with a unified assets/ directory embedded via rust-embed. All templates, schemas, and scaffold files become real editable files baked into the binary at compile time.

phases.name: Asset Infrastructure
phases.description: Add rust-embed to hex-cli, create the assets directory structure, and implement the Assets wrapper API.

tasks.name: Add rust-embed dependency and Assets struct
tasks.description: Add rust-embed to hex-cli/Cargo.toml. Create hex-cli/src/assets.rs with the Assets struct embedding hex-cli/assets/. Implement get_str(), render_template(), and extract_to() methods. Add pub mod assets to hex-cli/src/main.rs.

tasks.name: Create assets directory with schemas
tasks.description: Create hex-cli/assets/ directory structure: schemas/, scaffold/, templates/. Move docs/workplan-schema.json to assets/schemas/workplan.schema.json. Update hex plan schema command to use Assets::get_str() instead of include_str!.

phases.name: Extract Scaffold Templates
phases.description: Move hardcoded project scaffolding from init.rs into template files under assets/scaffold/.

tasks.name: Extract project.json template from init.rs
tasks.description: Find the hardcoded project.json generation in hex-cli/src/commands/init.rs. Extract it to assets/scaffold/.hex/project.json.tmpl with {{name}}, {{id}}, {{timestamp}} placeholders. Update init.rs to use Assets::render_template().

tasks.name: Extract settings.json and CLAUDE.md templates from init.rs
tasks.description: Extract hardcoded settings.json and CLAUDE.md scaffolds from init.rs into assets/scaffold/.claude/settings.json.tmpl and assets/scaffold/CLAUDE.md.tmpl. Update init.rs to use Assets::render_template() or Assets::extract_to().

tasks.name: Extract ADR template from adr.rs
tasks.description: Find the hardcoded ADR template in hex-cli/src/commands/adr.rs. Extract to assets/templates/adr.md.tmpl with {{number}}, {{title}}, {{date}}, {{status}} placeholders. Update adr.rs to use Assets::render_template().

phases.name: Extract Hook Scripts and Agent Definitions
phases.description: Move hook scripts, default agent definitions, and skill definitions into the asset bundle.

tasks.name: Extract statusline and hook scripts
tasks.description: Move the hex-statusline.cjs script and any hardcoded hook command strings into assets/templates/. If scripts are referenced by path in settings.json templates, update the paths. Extract adr-rules.toml default into assets/scaffold/.hex/adr-rules.toml.

tasks.name: Bundle default agent and skill definitions
tasks.description: Copy the canonical agent definitions (agents/*.yml) and skill definitions (skills/*.md) that ship with hex into assets/scaffold/.claude/agents/ and assets/scaffold/.claude/skills/. These are extracted on hex init so target projects have default agents available.

phases.name: Cleanup and hex assets list
phases.description: Remove all remaining include_str! and hardcoded strings, add debugging command.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-cli --release && cargo test -p hex-cli

tasks.name: Add hex assets list command
tasks.description: Add a hex assets list subcommand that iterates Assets::iter() and prints all embedded file paths with sizes. Useful for debugging what's baked into the binary. Format: path (size bytes).

tasks.name: Audit and remove remaining hardcoded templates
tasks.description: Grep hex-cli/src/ for remaining include_str!, format!() template patterns, and hardcoded multi-line strings that should be assets. Move any found into the appropriate assets/ subdirectory. After this: zero hardcoded templates in Rust source.
